title: Google Sheets access denied error
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Google Sheets, the user receives 'Error 403: access_denied'. This prevents access to the Google Sheets service.
applies_when: Trying to authenticate with Google services
not_this_if: Google Sheets API is already enabled
Correct credentials are already set up
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google Sheets API is not enabled for the project in the Google Cloud Console, or the service account does not have access to the specific Google Sheet being used.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console and select your project.
Enable the Google Sheets API for your project.
Set up the client ID and secret for OAuth2.
Use the service account email to share the Google Sheet with that account.
agent_instruction: Enable the Google Sheets API in the Google Cloud Console and share the sheet with the service account email.
